creator: Jeff.Kreska@MCI.Com
text:
This PR can be closed.  The problem was fixed in two ways.  The first
solution was to enable PlugPlay SCAM.  The second option which didn't
require PlugPlay SCAM wa to upgrade the BIOS on the 2940, because of a
termination bug.


--
Regards,
Jeff
mailto:jeff.kreska@mci.com
